ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "pmid_pmcid" TEXT /* PMID or PMCID identifier of the article */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the article */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the article */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal where the article is published */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "article_type" TEXT /* Type of the article (e.g., research article, review, editorial) */,
  "corresponding_author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding author */,
  "number_of_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the article */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the article */,
  "article_version" TEXT /* Version of the article (e.g., v1, v2) */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* License type (e.g., Creative Commons, Copyright) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the article was submitted */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_corresponding_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("corresponding_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the publisher is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_title" TEXT /* Title of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the journal (e.g., biology, chemistry, physics) */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the journal is open access */,
  "submission_fee" REAL /* Fee for submitting an article to the journal */,
  "average_review_time" INTEGER /* Average time (in days) for the review process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apcs" (
  "apc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each APC record */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related article */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost charged for processing the article */,
  "vat_included" INTEGER /* Indicates if VAT is included in the cost */,
  "vat_amount" REAL /* Amount of VAT included in the cost */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the charge (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the charge */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, overdue) */,
  "date_charged" TEXT /* Date the charge was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apcs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "funding_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the funding source */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Total amount of funding provided by the source */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., grant, scholarship) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding period */,
  "funding_description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_funding" (
  "article_funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-funding relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding source */,
  "funding_amount_allocated" REAL /* Amount of funding allocated to the article */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_funding_funding_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_funding_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the article (e.g., submitted, in review, published) */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status (e.g., 'awaiting review', 'revisions required') */,
  "reviewer_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewers */,
  "revisions_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if revisions are required */,
  "revised_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was revised */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_status_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_records" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "apc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the APC */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment transaction */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the APC */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, overdue) */,
  "payment_due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_records_apc_id FOREIGN KEY ("apc_id") REFERENCES apcs ("apc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object affected by the action */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the object (e.g., article, user, funding) */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the object before the action */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the object after the action */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role has administrative privileges */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
